unit.note: Full suites re-run in the iterate worktree AFTER the internal code-review fixes. server: 198 files, 2319 passed + 1 skipped (adds jsonl-records.test.ts, jsonl-records.faults.test.ts, triage-write.newline.test.ts, triage-store.recovery.test.ts, triage.recovery-api.test.ts). client: 295 files, 2695 passed (untouched - zero client source changed). 0 failures; tsc --noEmit clean; oxlint reports no new warnings for any added file.

integration.note: webui vitest does not separate an integration layer; the cross-module composition (writer guard + reader recovery, and recovery through the real Hono route) is covered inside the unit suites.

e2e.note: client/e2e/flows/triage-record-boundary-recovery.spec.ts executed (not merely authored) against an isolated single-process stack: temp USERPROFILE, built client via SHIPWRIGHT_STATIC_DIR, Hono on PORT=3901 bound 127.0.0.1, BASE_URL pinned to 127.0.0.1. Seeds a real project via POST /api/projects whose triage.jsonl holds a concatenated record pair plus a partially-unrecoverable line, then asserts both halves AND the partial-line survivor render in the Triage tab and open in the detail modal.

smoke.note: Isolated Hono booted clean on :3901 with the temp profile (health 200) for the E2E run, then torn down.

surface_verification.justification: Backend-affects-Frontend: the diff changes core/triage-board-read.ts, which feeds GET /api/triage/:projectId and therefore the Inbox, so surface=api would under-claim. The failure mode is only observable at the UI - before the fix a concatenated line made findings silently vanish from the Inbox with no error anywhere - so the web surface is where the regression is genuinely pinned. Route-level coverage also exists (triage.recovery-api.test.ts, 5 cases through the real Hono app incl. a dismiss round-trip).

behaviors.behavior: endsWithoutNewline: missing / zero-byte / LF / CRLF / unterminated / directory
splitRecords: concatenated line yields ALL records in wire order
splitRecords: PARTIAL recovery - valid record AND verbatim remainder
behaviors.evidence: jsonl-records.test.ts partial recovery + verbatim remainder PASSED

behaviors.behavior: splitRecords: no resync past a malformed record (raw_decode parity)
splitRecords: only JSON objects are records (scalar/array are fragments)
splitRecords lexical safety: braces in strings, escaped quote, backslash run, nesting, unterminated string
behaviors.evidence: jsonl-records.test.ts lexical edge cases (5 cases) PASSED

behaviors.behavior: splitRecords: NBSP / U+000B / U+000C are NOT JSON whitespace
behaviors.evidence: jsonl-records.test.ts unicode whitespace it.each (3 cases) PASSED

behaviors.behavior: splitRecords: non-finite numeric literal degrades to fragment, never throws
slow-path work budgets: attempt ceiling and line-length ceiling degrade to fragment; a long VALID record still takes the fast path
endsWithoutNewline fault injection: short read, live-end fstat sizing, fd closed on throw, no close when open fails, zero-byte short-circuit
parseJsonlRecords: order preserved, 1-based lineNo, blank-line numbering, CRLF absorbed, per-line fragments
writer: no concatenation onto an unterminated predecessor
behaviors.evidence: triage-write.newline.test.ts does not concatenate PASSED (was RED before the fix)

behaviors.behavior: writer: no blank line injected for LF / CRLF / missing / zero-byte targets
writer+reader COMPOSE: a lost TOCTOU race still loses no record
behaviors.evidence: triage-write.newline.test.ts loses no record when a lost race PASSED

behaviors.behavior: store: recovery at readAllItems, across the tracked-outbox union, and composing with two-pass status resolution
store: recovery on the WRITE hot path (appendIdsInFile residence probe)
behaviors.evidence: triage-store.recovery.test.ts sees a concatenated append PASSED

behaviors.behavior: reporting: silent when clean or fully recovered; exactly one structured warn with bounded metadata and NO fragment text; true total vs capped sample

cross-language parity over a DELIBERATELY corrupted fixture resolved by the REAL Python reader, incl. the lexical class (brace-in-string, escaped quote, backslash run) and the by-contract unrecoverable cases
behaviors.evidence: triage-store.recovery.test.ts deep-equals real Python (8 items) PASSED

behaviors.behavior: parity fixture round-trips byte-exact through git (no EOL normalization)
HTTP consumer chain: list returns both records, partial keeps its valid record, counts no longer under-count, wholly-corrupt still 200, dismiss lands on a recovered file
behaviors.evidence: triage.recovery-api.test.ts (5 cases, real Hono app) PASSED

behaviors.behavior: web surface: both halves of a concatenated line reach the Inbox and open in the detail modal
behaviors.evidence: client/e2e/flows/triage-record-boundary-recovery.spec.ts executed against an isolated stack, 1 passed

behaviors.behavior: bloat: triage-store.ts stays at or under its 305-line grandfathered baseline
